---
title: "livefigures gallery"
---

Every figure in this gallery renders at build time from an editable,
version-controlled source file — no exported images anywhere in the repo.
Each page shows one source format; the source files live in
[`figures/`](figures/).

- [Excalidraw](excalidraw.qmd) — hand-drawn diagrams
- [Vega-Lite & Vega](vega.qmd) — charts and force-directed graphs
- [nomnoml](nomnoml.qmd) — node-edge and UML diagrams from terse text
- [WaveDrom](wavedrom.qmd) — timing and register diagrams
- [bytefield](bytefield.qmd) — byte and packet layouts

All of these formats were chosen for **agent fluency**: they're plain text
or JSON that AI coding agents author and edit reliably. Every figure here
was written by an agent.
